---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem would this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap. Example: "I'm frustrated when..." or "It would be great if..."

## Proposed solution

How do you think this should work?

## What type of contribution is this?

- [ ] New prompt template
- [ ] New content pillar pack (industry: _____)
- [ ] New caption framework
- [ ] New platform support (platform: _____)
- [ ] New campaign type playbook
- [ ] Improvement to existing feature
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other: _____

## Have you tested this approach?

If you've tried a workaround or tested your idea informally, share what you learned.

## Additional context

Any screenshots, examples, or references that would help.
